calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Adams for and with Kira Eldemir and Michael Aronson (Successor
Co-Trustees).
Caroline Hinshaw Court appointed Counsel for Maurice Edwards (Settlor).

The Court questions a 25-hour time entry and a 35-hour time entry on one day, and stated that the credit card expenses need to be itemized. Ms. Hinshaw stated that for convenience, the credit card needs to continue being used. Mr. Adams stated that the 35 hour entry should have been in the minute's column, that the 1% guideline is appropriate because of the Co-Trustees abilities and what they have accomplished, and that their work commenced six months before appointment. Mr. Adams also stated that Trustee did not provide documents, that the Settlor was not treated well by the prior Trustee, spoke of Ms. Eldemir's and Mr. Aronson's experiences/professions, stated that Mr. Edwards now has a stable caregiver and that the Co-Trustees have made Mr. Edwards' life pleasurable again. In addition, Mr. Adams stated that CRC 7.756 standards indicate that the Co-Trustees should be getting the 1% guideline fees and that the Co-Trustees also dealt with the investments. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she can corroborate everything Mr. Adams said. The First Account and Report of Successor Co-Trustees, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Der for petitioner Wende Brock; Geoffrey Adams for trustees Michael Aronson and Kira Eldememir; Caroline Hinshaw for Trustor Maurice Edwards, Jr.

Mr. Der informed the Court that the parties have now signed a settlement agreement, under which the objection to the accounting is being withdrawn, petitioner's fees are being reduced, and the first and final report is filed. He added that 8 missing bonds will be replaced, as the trustees have stated they were not received with the other documents delivered to them. He noted that Court approval of the settlement is not required. The Court ordered the status hearing off calendar, and the First and Final Report is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Oct-31-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (former trustee) Wende Brock. Geoffrey Adams for (co-trustees) Kira Eldemir & Michael Aronson. Court Appointed counsel Caroline Hinshaw for Maurice Edwards.

The Court noted that some statements have been filed. Mr. Der responded that it has been a challenge getting the balance of the bank statements, that they will need the help of the current trustees and that they have had informal discussions regarding objections to the accounting but that they have not been filed. Mr. Adams stated that the objections are prepared, that they hoped to resolve the matters, that he is having a difference of opinion with his clients and they are seeking other counsel, that there is still an issue with the savings bonds being inventoried, that they have never received the bonds, that if the bonds are not found they will need to make a claim and will need the cooperation of Ms. Brock and that if the amount is recovered there will not be the issue of fees. Mr. Der stated that the discussions have been going on for some time and that they received four pages of objections that they are responding to. The Court stated that it hopes the substitution of counsel will not slow things down. The accounting petition was continued to October 31, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a response to the examiner's notes.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Settlors Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustees And Petition For Order Bringing Trust Under Court Supervsion
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions Re: Validity Of Appointment Of Co-Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Wende Brock. John Mounier for (trustor) Duke (Maurice)Edwards. Jeff Adams for (proposed trustees) Kira Eldemir & Michael Aronson. Nancy Rasch for (temporary conservator) Debra Dolch. Court appointed counsel Caroline Hinshaw for Maurice Edwards. Also present in court are Eric Gross, Daniel Liebken, Kenneth Olson, Maurice Edwards, Kira Eldemir and Michael Aronson.

The Court asked if there have been any objections. Ms. Hinshaw stated that Mr. Jackson objects, that he was aware of the hearing today and that he will not decline unless he is paid. The Court stated that it is ready to take the matter under submission but needs the following: a filed copy of the resignation of Brock, a filed declination of Mr. Jackson, a copy of the neuropsych report and a revised order. Mr. Mounier provided the copy of the neuropsych report to the court and stated that it has not been distributed to anyone due to confidentiality, that it is for internal use only and agreed to provide a copy to Ms. Rasch. Ms. Rasch stated that they have been waiting for the report and that they may be able to withdraw the conservatorship petition if the report supports that Mr. Edwards has capacity to make decisions. Mr. Mounier stated that there is contention that Mr. Edwards does not have capacity and that he did not change his estate plan he just changed trustees. Ms. Hinshaw stated that they will be filing an objection regarding the care plan. The petition for instructions re: validity of appointment of co-successor trustee was taken off calendar. The settlors petition for appointment of successor co-trustees and petition for order bringing trust under court supervision was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Re: Validity Of Appointment Of Co-Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Validity Of Appointment Of Co-Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Petitioner Wende Brock; Caroline Hinshaw for Maurice Edwards; John Mounier for Maurice Edwards; Jeffrey Adams for Kira Eldemir and Michael Aronson
Mr. Mounier stated that he has demanded a trial date, but desires to proceed with a mediation of the matters before the Court. Ms. Hinshaw agreed to proceed through mediation. Mr. Der stated his opinion that determination of the successor trustee was not an issue for mediation. Mr. Adams stated that there were questions regarding the validity of service, as his clients had not been served. Mr. der responded that those not served were contingent beneficiaries and not entitiled to service. Ms. Hinshaw stated that the supplement to the petition, seeking to bring the trust under court supervision, was not properly before the Court as not being properly noticed. Mr. Der replied that the original petition had requested the granting of all appropriate relief, so the request for court supervision was within the relief available under the first petition. The Court stated that it would be better to keep all the matters before the Court together and continue them all to a later date. Ms. Hinshad stated that a temporary conservator had been appointed for Mr. Edwards, and that a hearing was set on a petition for appointment of a guardian was set for August 20, 2015. The hearing on all matters was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

Ex Parte Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
